text_anchor: The navigation bar is rendering behind the main content instead of staying on top.
positive_node: <header className="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-terra-200">

text_anchor: The featured badge labels are not appearing on top of plant photos as intended.
positive_node: <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 flex flex-col gap-2 z-0">

text_anchor: Plants are stacking vertically even on desktop screens instead of displaying side by side.
positive_node: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-1 gap-6">

text_anchor: The eco-friendly badges are no longer displaying horizontally across the page width.
positive_node: <div className="flex flex-col justify-center gap-8 md:gap-16 text-terra-800">

text_anchor: The footer heading text is much too large and breaks the layout.
Care guide text has reduced contrast and is much smaller than before.
Content is positioned too high and overlapping with the section above it.
positive_node: <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12 -mt-20">

text_anchor: The plant card content has almost no padding, making it feel cramped.
The text overlay gradient is too transparent, making the heading almost invisible.
positive_node: <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-terra-900/20 via-terra-800/10 to-transparent" />

text_anchor: A white button is appearing outside the card boundaries at an odd position.
positive_node: <button className="absolute -bottom-8 right-4 bg-white text-terra-900 p-3 rounded-full shadow-lg opacity-100 translate-y-4 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-y-0 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-moss-600 hover:text-white">
